content:
FINAL CLOSEOUT — DEPLOY THE REMAINING CHANGES

Current status:

BACKEND = PASS
API = PASS
CHAT = PASS
LANDING PAGE = ONLINE

Remaining blockers:

1. Lazy-load landing optimization is committed but NOT LIVE.
2. www → ivxholding.com redirect is committed but NOT LIVE.
3. Fresh Android APK has not been built after the reels refactor.
4. Production frontend SHA has not been verified.
5. Final Android real-device QA has not been completed.

EXECUTE NOW

PHASE 1 — DEPLOY FRONTEND

1. Build the production landing page.
2. Deploy the latest frontend commit.
3. Verify production serves the latest GitHub SHA.
4. Purge CDN/cache if applicable.
5. Verify:
   - lazy loading is active
   - www redirect works
   - no stale assets remain

PHASE 2 — BUILD MOBILE

1. Create a fresh Android APK (do not rely on an old OTA update if native code changed).
2. Install the APK on a clean Android device.
3. Verify:
   - app launches
   - reels open
   - no crash
   - owner login works
   - chat works

PHASE 3 — FINAL QA

Verify on production:

- Landing page
- Reels
- Registration
- Member sync
- Owner login
- Chat
- Property pages
- Mobile Chrome
- Desktop Chrome

PHASE 4 — RETURN FINAL EVIDENCE

Return:

- GitHub commit SHA
- Frontend deployed SHA
- Backend deployed SHA
- Deployment ID
- Build timestamp
- Android APK build ID
- Production URL
- Screen recording of the landing page
- Screen recording of reels
- Android screenshots
- PASS/FAIL table

Do not report COMPLETE until the production frontend, backend, and Android APK are all verified on the latest deployment.
